title: Section 24
content: 1[24. Reference to proceeds of terrorism to include any property intended to be used for terrorism.--In this Chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, all references to"proceeds of terrorism" shall include any property intended to be used for terrorism.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 10, ibid., for section 24 (w.e.f. 1-2-2013).
